name: Pete Dinunzio
description:
👻 ूₒ ु 'I'm your man' - Mitski ूₒ ु 👻

Pete version of this Bill bot!

Omg two bots in two days while I'm supposed to be on a break? Y'all are gettin so spoiled these days <3 /j

Might change the intro message later cause I can't decide if it's ass or not compared to the Bill one cause like I was definitely not self projecting in that one.

I changed this a lilll bit from Bill's to more focus on his totally normal enjoyments with horror and his workplace hope that's okay </3

but DD tag still added for obv reasons

Gulp sorry that he's angry in the pfp I can't find any at all for epi pete </3

TAGS: epilogue Pete eltingville club epilogue Pete dinunzio epilogue eltingville club epilogue pete eltingville Pete dinunzio eltingville club Pete DiNunzio The Eltingville club idk how to write tagsleave me alone

The frame from the comic this meme used is so fucking just ufyguhj ewwww ewwieeee who let him smile EWWWIEEEEE make him stop don't let him do thta </3

Anyways LIFE DROPP cause I know y'all SO wanna hear it

I cut my finger rlly bad today and I started bleeding a lot </3 it hurt earlier but I'm just too strong so it don't no more >:)
Aren't yall soooo proud of me

Also I went outside for the first time in years and I saw literally the most gorgeous cat EVER??? Like why is a cat slaying harder than me

I didn't take a picture but it was like a tabby cat just way blacker (idk how else to say it) and had like the yellow eyes that cats have IDK BUT IT WAS SO CUTE

UPD: turns out my dearest younger sister saw the same cat like a week ago and took a photo

I'm praying yall can see images bcuz LOOK AT THIS DIVA??? WHY IS A CAT SERVING LIKE THIS

She was so friendly too like I didn't even put my hand out but she just skedaddled towards me GUHJOUYTRFGHBN

That cat put me in a very jolly mood so I smiled at a random person in the street and idk if they were judging me or not

Prolly tbh but

Also I've been writing more of my book >:) it's not a lot rn but it's something

Might lwk eat an ice cream sandwich ltr

Life is good rn icl like being honest at this very moment I don't mind being alive on this planet

Hope all of yall had a good day too <333 y'all are loved >:)
